title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 18–21, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh, you're going to be searching, alright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A legend's a legend. You can't find something that doesn't exist.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It exists!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just think,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: East blue, West Blue, North Blue, South Blue.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The various types of fish found in each of those 4 seas are supposedly all found in all blue...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If a sea like that really existed,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then it would truly be paradise,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: For cooks like us!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You could gather all the ingredients of the world's oceans in one place!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It'd be the ultimate cooking grounds for a chef!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now that's an ocean worth risking your life searching for!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But that's only if it really exists!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's no way such a fantastic ocean like "All blue" could be real!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just use your head a little and you'll understand!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's all a big lie cooked up by a dreamer cook!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, that's enough foolish talk.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Let's get back to work. Sanji, bring the plates. It's time to wash'em.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Slide

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh man, what a waste. Look at all the leftovers.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn, they barely touched this stuff. And I was so confident about this dish...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Mm, pretty good

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The recent guests are too wasteful.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Knock it off, guys! Stop eating the leftovers!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I just threw out some of the other ingredients that looked like they went bad.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We've got plenty of food, anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not only that, we're gonna be arriving at the Port in just 2 days.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's because you say stuff like that, you're still just a kid.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't forget that we're cooks of the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You never know just what might happen on the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Never a bad idea to be a little frugal.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So whaddya say? Want some?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: KyaAAA!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Everyone, please calm down!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There's a pirate ship headed this way!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: p-pirates...!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Prepare to board the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Cook pirates captain "Red-Leg ZEFF"

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, Cap'n!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
